questions.prompt: Susan gave up... five years ago.
... people sing country music in Spain.
My brother is coming to pick me... at the bus station.
When her parents passed away, she was brought up by a foster family.
answers: When her parents passed away, a foster family brought her up

questions.prompt: Did they make these high-end clothes in Spain in the 1990s?
answers: Were these high-end clothes made in Spain in the 1990s?

questions.prompt: They used to go to the cinema every two weeks.
questions.instruction: Give a question for the underlined words.
answers: How often did they use to go to the cinema?

questions.prompt: Mary has got a new boyfriend. His mother is a very well-known writer.
answers: Mary has got a new boyfriend whose mother is a very well-known writer

questions.prompt: We suggest that we make a move today.
answers: What about making a move today?

questions.prompt: If she dares to do that again, ...
First, Sophie warmed up for ten minutes. Then, she worked out for two hours.
answers: After warming up for ten minutes, Sophie worked out for two hours
After she / Sophie (had) warmed up for ten minutes, she / Sophie worked out for two hours
After she / Sophie warmed up for ten minutes, she / Sophie worked out for two hours

questions.prompt: A friend of us has worked like a hairdresser in the past, but he wouldn’t like to do it again.
questions.instruction: Find the mistakes and rewrite correctly.
answers: A friend of ours has worked as a hairdresser in the past, but he wouldn’t like to do it again

questions.prompt: ‘We won’t meet our new literature teacher tomorrow,’ the students said.
answers: The students said that they wouldn’t meet their new literature teacher the following day / the next day / the day after

questions.prompt: Use the words in the boxes to make a meaningful sentence. Use all and only the words in the boxes without changing their form.
questions.instruction: Words: did / long / for / you / come / wait / the / train / to / how
answers: How long did you wait for the train to come?
